productDisplayName: Clarks Women Soma Silk Leather Black Heels
description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Soma sandals from clarks. The knotted strap detailing and the wedge heel gives it an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very girly look. Upper Leather uppers comprised of knotted straps covering forefoot and midfoot for durability and comfort Black leather for added style Midsole Lushly cushioned footbed for absolute comfort Outsole Wedge heel for added style with textured design Textured rubber outsole with paisley engraved design on the forefoot and heel for better grip shoe care Use a branded leather polish to keep your shoes shining Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
